hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
protected = ['.env', 'terraform.tfvars']
for p in protected:
    if path.endswith(p):
        print(f'Blocked: {path} is protected — edit manually', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(2)
"
